channel.title: research on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in research on Analyst

item.title: Forensics vs Pentest
item.description: Forensics vs Penetration testing These two fields are closely related, for you have to acquire the same knowledge but you are just using it differently.

item.title: DNS Cache
item.description: This research is devoted to DNS cache and …

item.title: Memory Addressing
item.description: I’ve had a lot of time to dive into certain pecularities of how programs are outlined both in RAM and on disk when working as a malware analyst.

item.title: Browser Forensics
item.description: In the process of investigating Toy PD case, I’ve realised I lack the information about different browser files.

item.title: A Few Good Bits
item.description: Saturday I’ve recently have had a severe poisoning (I only hope it’s not the rotavirus 😨) and I’ve spent one evening and one day barely moving.

item.title: App Transport Security
item.description: In this article I’m trying to untangle a very confusing notion for some people (myself included) - App Transport Security.

item.title: Apple LAContext vs User Presence
item.description: In this article I’n going to research this: how LAContext is different from User Presence, in what way it’s better.

item.title: IOS Loggs
item.description: About iOS logs here. Syslog According to Apple docs, NSLog now doesn’t write to syslog, therefore I didn’t find a syslog.

item.title: Ios Loggs
item.description: About iOS logs here. Syslog According to Apple docs, NSLog now doesn’t write to syslog, therefore I didn’t find a syslog.

item.title: TCP
item.description: This article collects the basics of TCP protocol. Its friend UDP (transport layer protocol as well) is faster but less reliable.

item.title: Debugging
item.description: In this article I’m assembling all possible to anti-debugging techniques and how they can be curcumvented.
